author: doll-agent
content: Replace broadcast_binary's eager Vec<(usize, usize)> materialization with a streaming BroadcastIter that produces pairs lazily. Implement Iterator + ExactSizeIterator. The single caller (concat::add) iterates pairs sequentially, so this is strictly memory-equivalent and avoids the intermediate allocation for large broadcast results. Update test sites to .collect() the iterator before assertion. Add 1 size_hint test.
